name: test_should_select_time_into_date_time[datetime({year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, hour: 12, timezone: 'Europe/Stockholm'})-{year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, time: other, second: 42}-'1984-10-11T12:00:42+01:00[Europe/Stockholm]']
